creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
If we had to cleanse our sources off of Hitler quotes:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/usr.bin/fortune/datfiles/fortunes?r1=325781&r2=325780&pathrev=325781

we should have removed bits and pieces from other monsters, such as, for example, Joseph Stalin, Lenin, and various lesser Communists, as well as Charles Manson.
